KEEP THE AREA CLEAN: BRUSH GENTLY AND THOROUGHLY. RINSE MOUTH WITH WATER AFTER MEALS. AVOID HARD FOODS TO PREVENT DAMAGE. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION*  
* * *  
USE TEMPORARY FILLING MATERIALS: APPLY OVER-THE-COUNTER PRODUCTS. FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY. AVOID ASPIRIN TO PREVENT BLEEDING. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION*  
* * *  
MONITOR FOR CHANGES: NOTICE INCREASED PAIN OR SWELLING. SEEK DENTAL CARE AS SOON AS POSSIBLE. DENTAL EMERGENCIES REQUIRE IMMEDIATE ATTENTION. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION*  

BOX AND CAR ARE PART OF THE TRADITION. TWO MAIN STEPS ARE TO CLEAN AND RINSE. KEEP THE AREA CLEAN TO AVOID FURTHER DAMAGE.
